User Story: As a consumer I drop a btn button and get shadcn-styled buttons with variants, sizes, loading and grouped modes, zero JS.

Edge Cases: btn-link inside btn-group | aria-busy + disabled | vertical group corners | reduced-motion

User Story: As a consumer I render status badges with semantic color variants and an optional leading dot.

Edge Cases: badge-outline + badge-dot | long text nowrap fixed height | status tokens defined

User Story: As a consumer I use a .toggle button whose pressed visual is driven by aria-pressed.

Edge Cases: disabled toggle | JS requirement honesty

User Story: As a consumer I get a zero-JS segmented control where native radios or checkboxes drive checked styling.
Expected Behaviour: Hidden inputs + adjacent label highlight on :checked; outline border-collapsing; vertical orientation; sizes.
Edge Cases: outline + vertical | input-then-label order required | focus-visible ring via input:focus-visible

User Story: As a publisher I build a deterministic CSS bundle, copy it into the showcase, gitignore the copy, and ship dist+src via npm.
Expected Behaviour: build.mjs bundles+minifies, copies min into apps/www, dist tracked, www copy ignored; exports resolve; counts/size consistent.
Edge Cases: rebuild determinism | tarball file count vs 52 components | exports targets exist

User Story: As a user I see a description normally and an error message swapped in when the field becomes invalid.

Edge Cases: pristine required on load | select invalid | placeholder-less required

User Story: As QA I confirm previously-waived CSS-only limits are still genuine platform limits.

User Story: As a user I see determinate and indeterminate progress that animates and respects reduced motion.

User Story: As a maintainer build bundles src into dist, copies into showcase (gitignored), primes layers, publishes scoped pkg.

User Story: As a consumer, tall dialog content scrolls and the close button can dismiss with no JS.
Expected Behaviour: dialog.dialog has max-height + overflow:auto; .dialog-close documented via form method=dialog.
Edge Cases: Content taller than viewport

User Story: As a consumer, a sheet/drawer with no data-side still pins to a sensible edge with a matching slide.

Edge Cases: No data-side attribute

User Story: As a consumer bundling shadcss, the cascade layer order survives and components do not override tokens.

Feature Name: Build dist-copy, gitignore, npm pack surface

User Story: As a screen-reader user, a closed drawer/sheet is not reachable in the tab order.

Edge Cases: dialog without [open]

User Story: As a user the menu opens attached to its trigger on all sides.

Edge Cases: No anchor-name set | viewport edge flip | top-end vs bottom-start

User Story: As a SR user each OTP digit input is labelled.

Expected Behaviour: name=faq makes details mutually exclusive; only one open at load.
Edge Cases: multiple open attrs

User Story: As an AI/dev consumer I want registry.json honest, complete (52), schema-disclaimed, and accurate.
Expected Behaviour: No $schema, honest note, 52 entries matching 52 css files, accurate markup/classes.
Edge Cases: chart/data-table virtual not in components array | container entry present

Feature Name: Tabs ARIA correctness in registry markup
User Story: As an a11y consumer I want the tabs markup to expose a valid ARIA tab pattern.
Expected Behaviour: tablist contains only tab roles; tabs linked to panels via aria-controls/labelledby.
Edge Cases: radio inputs live inside tabs-list

User Story: As a dev I want the @supports anchor block to actually position popovers, not silently break.
Expected Behaviour: anchor() rules resolve against the trigger; otherwise fallback inset applies.
Edge Cases: popovertarget does not auto-establish a position-anchor

User Story: As a dev I want @layer priming to match used layers so the cascade order is correct.
Expected Behaviour: Priming line lists exactly the layers used in source.

User Story: As a dev I want invalid-state styles to fire only after interaction, not on initial render of empty required fields.
Expected Behaviour: No premature error display on untouched fields.
Edge Cases: empty required field on load | select:invalid with no placeholder option

User Story: As a reader I want claims to be honest and consistent post de-fraud.
Expected Behaviour: 52 count, ~16KB verified, non-affiliation disclaimer, scoped @russfranky/shadcss, no absolutist 0-JS.
Edge Cases: package.json description still absolutist

Feature Name: npm tarball / exports / dist-copy / gitignore / CDN
User Story: As a publisher I want exports to resolve, the dist-copy gitignored, qa excluded from the tarball, CDN usage safe.
Expected Behaviour: exports valid; dist built; copy + qa gitignored; files whitelist excludes qa; CDN URL pinned.
Edge Cases: CSS exports condition
